parameters.description: Allows you to specify the number of circles between each pair of input circles.

parameters.name: majoraxes

parameters.label: Minimum Twist

parameters.name: lroffset2
parameters.label: Lroffset2
parameters.description: These parameters allow you to override the distance between circles, thereby affecting the shape of the joint.
